title: Refer Me
description: An online platform for engineering students, built using the MERN stack and utilizing Firebase and MongoDB for database storage

title: DevLink-Connect
description: A developer connection platform to facilitate networking among coding professionals.

title: OSimulate
description: Developed a simulation of key operating system algorithms in C++.

title: Random GIF Generator
description: Developed a web application that generates random GIFs using the Giphy API.
Allows users to click a button to fetch and display random GIFs based on user-input keywords or categories.

title: WEATHER APP
description: It is a Node.js server application that fetches real-time weather data using OpenWeatherMap API and displays it on a web page.
